brightsmith_specReference.versionNote: v1.1 (2026-04-30) §5 Option-C amendment: original spec used base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment as the SOLE FTE source, which covered only 74.5% of EADA institutions (NULL-ing the 521 ~25.5% institutions missing from IPEDS Finance, predominantly 2-year colleges — NJCAA / CCCAA / NWAC). §2 Decision 3 was amended to adopt Option C: COALESCE(base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment, bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount) with explicit fte_source provenance ('ipeds_finance' / 'eada_fte_headcount' / 'none'). Hybrid coverage ≈ 100%. The two FTE definitions are NOT identical (total_fte_enrollment is annualized; eada_fte_headcount is 12-month headcount per Knight Commission convention) — fte_source makes the methodological mix explicit so downstream consumers can stratify or filter. Silver-EDA recalibrations are ALSO captured here: BSE-EAD-007 athletic_subsidy_ratio band widened from [-1.0, 1.0] to [-3.0, 1.0] after empirical falsification on 4 institutions (Binghamton -2.92, Haskell Indian Nations -2.56, Kennedy-King -1.57, Rust College -1.43) where reported athletic revenue exceeds expenses by more than 2× — these reflect institutional-transfer accounting, not data defects, per fp-data-reviewer §7 prior flag. BSE-EAD-010 invariant inverted from 'P50 > 0 (most athletic programs lose money)' to 'P50 == 0 AND P5 < 0 AND P95 == 0' after EDA confirmed the OPE/EADA ledger convention double-counts institutional support on both sides of the ledger — 63% of rows have revenue == expenses exactly and 0% have revenue < expenses; observed P5=-0.157 / P50=0.0 / P95=0.0 / min=-2.92 / max=0.0. The recalibrated invariant still detects sign-flips and threshold drift.

brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver-zone promote of bronze.eada into base.eada per spec v1.1 §5 Option-C amendment. The EadaBaseTransformer at src/silver/eada_base.py performs a cross-source LEFT JOIN: bronze.eada (the 17-column institution-totals grain, snapshot 2061189972643103988, post-EFTotalCount re-ingest per the §4 amendment) LEFT JOIN base.ipeds_finance (snapshot 1277941459950591173) on UNITID. The promote produces the 17-column base.eada table at the UNITID grain: 7 passthrough columns from bronze (unitid, institution_name, reporting_year, total_athletic_expenses, total_athletic_revenue, recruiting_expenses, eada_fte_headcount), 1 hybrid FTE column (total_fte_enrollment) computed as COALESCE(base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment, bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount), 1 provenance column (fte_source) computed as a CASE expression on the same two inputs, 2 boolean coverage flags (has_ipeds_finance_fte, has_eada_fte), 4 derived per-FTE / ratio columns (athletic_spend_per_fte, athletic_revenue_per_fte, recruiting_per_fte, athletic_subsidy_ratio), and 2 framework provenance columns (source_load_date, ingested_at). record_id is the surrogate key. The three per-FTE columns inherit the fte_source of their denominator (the COALESCE'd total_fte_enrollment) and are NULL when the denominator is NULL or ≤ 0 — no imputation. athletic_subsidy_ratio is computed only from the raw monetary columns (total_athletic_expenses, total_athletic_revenue) and is independent of FTE source.
brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoningContinued: Output: 2,040 rows / 17 columns / snapshot 973879610917339278. Row-count conservation holds (2,040 in / 2,040 out — bronze.eada is already at the UNITID grain via the InstLevel.xlsx file selection in the bronze ingestor, so the silver promote is 1-to-1). All 13 DQ rules from governance/dq-rules/base-eada.json (11 P0 + 2 P1) PASS with zero violations against this snapshot per the scorecard at governance/dq-scorecards/base-eada-20260501T210828Z.json — overall_pass=true, p0_gate_blocking=false. The silver-EDA-calibrated rules (BSE-EAD-007 widened band, BSE-EAD-010 OPE-ledger inversion, BSE-EAD-009 fte_source enum and 'none' rate ≤ 1%, BSE-EAD-011 fte_source distribution ≈ 74.5/25.5 ±5pp, BSE-EAD-013 IPEDS-preference cross-source invariant) all pass, confirming the Option-C COALESCE behaves as specified — IPEDS Finance is preferred where available, EADA EFTotalCount fills the 25.5% gap, and the methodological mix is faithfully tagged. No new chaos run is required at silver — DQ pass is the regression check per Brightsmith convention.

documentation.description: Silver-zone promote of bronze.eada into base.eada per spec full-pipeline-eada.md §5 (Option-C amendment, 2026-04-30). Cross-source LEFT JOIN: bronze.eada LEFT JOIN base.ipeds_finance on UNITID. Hybrid FTE source: total_fte_enrollment = COALESCE(base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment, bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount); fte_source = CASE WHEN base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment IS NOT NULL THEN 'ipeds_finance' WHEN bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount IS NOT NULL THEN 'eada_fte_headcount' ELSE 'none' END. Per-FTE columns (athletic_spend_per_fte, athletic_revenue_per_fte, recruiting_per_fte) inherit the fte_source of their denominator and are NULL when the denominator is NULL or ≤ 0 — no imputation. athletic_subsidy_ratio = (total_athletic_expenses - total_athletic_revenue) / NULLIF(total_athletic_expenses, 0) is computed from raw monetary columns only and is independent of FTE source. Idempotent promote pattern: same UNITID grain, same snapshot semantics, overwrites prior snapshot if rerun. Grain: UNITID. Dedup grain: [unitid].
documentation.amendment: Option-C (2026-04-30) — hybrid FTE source with provenance

dataSource.name: Bronze EADA — institution totals (post-EFTotalCount §4 amendment re-ingest)
dataSource.ingestNote: Re-ingested 2026-04-30 with eada_fte_headcount (EFTotalCount) added per spec v1.1 §4 amendment — required to support the Option-C COALESCE FTE source.

fields.name: unitid
fields.description: IPEDS 6-digit institution ID. Cross-source join key to base.ipeds_finance.

fields.name: reporting_year
fields.description: EADA reporting year (e.g., 2022 for the 2022–2023 publication).

fields.name: total_athletic_expenses
fields.description: EADA GRND_TOTAL_EXPENSE — institution total athletic expenses.

fields.name: total_athletic_revenue
fields.description: EADA GRND_TOTAL_REVENUE — institution total athletic revenue.

fields.name: recruiting_expenses
fields.description: EADA RECRUITEXP_TOTAL — institution total recruiting expenses.

fields.name: eada_fte_headcount
fields.description: EADA EFTotalCount (12-month enrollment headcount). Added 2026-04-30 §4 amendment to support Option-C hybrid FTE.

dataSource.name: Base IPEDS Finance (FY2023, all three forms F1A/F2/F3 unioned, EFIA-joined for FTE)

fields.name: total_fte_enrollment
fields.description: EFIA-derived 12-Month Instructional Activity FTE — NULL-safe COALESCE(FTEUG,0)+COALESCE(FTEGD,0)+COALESCE(FTEDPP,0). Annualized (NOT the same construct as EADA EFTotalCount, which is 12-month headcount). Preferred FTE source per §2 Decision 3 Option-C.

fields.name: athletic_subsidy_ratio
fields.description: Independent of FTE source. Range [-3.0, 1.0] per BSE-EAD-007 (silver-EDA-calibrated 2026-04-30).

record_id.transformationDescription: Direct passthrough from bronze.eada.record_id. Surrogate key carried through silver promote.

unitid.transformationDescription: Direct passthrough. Also serves as the cross-source LEFT-JOIN key against base.ipeds_finance.

eada_fte_headcount.transformationDescription: Direct passthrough of EADA EFTotalCount (12-month enrollment headcount). Added to bronze 2026-04-30 per §4 amendment specifically to enable the Option-C COALESCE in this silver promote.

total_fte_enrollment.transformationDescription: Hybrid FTE source per §5 Option-C amendment (2026-04-30). Computed as COALESCE(base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment, bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount). IPEDS-Finance value (annualized FTE) is preferred; EADA EFTotalCount (12-month headcount) is the fallback. The two definitions are NOT identical — the methodological mix is tagged in fte_source. Hybrid coverage ≈ 100% (vs. 74.5% for IPEDS-only, which NULL-ed 521 ~25.5% predominantly 2-year-college institutions).

fte_source.transformationDescription: Provenance column for total_fte_enrollment. CASE WHEN base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment IS NOT NULL THEN 'ipeds_finance' WHEN bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount IS NOT NULL THEN 'eada_fte_headcount' ELSE 'none' END. Distribution per BSE-EAD-011: ~74.5% ipeds_finance, ~25.5% eada_fte_headcount, <1% none.

has_ipeds_finance_fte.transformationDescription: Boolean coverage flag: TRUE iff base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment was non-null for this UNITID after the LEFT JOIN.

has_eada_fte.transformationDescription: Boolean coverage flag: TRUE iff bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount was non-null (expected ~100% post §4 amendment re-ingest).

athletic_spend_per_fte.transformationDescription: total_athletic_expenses / NULLIF(COALESCE(base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment, bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount), 0). NULL when either operand is NULL or when the COALESCE'd FTE ≤ 0. Inherits the fte_source of its denominator. No imputation. Arithmetic invariant BSE-EAD-008: athletic_spend_per_fte * total_fte_enrollment ≈ total_athletic_expenses within $1 where all three non-null.

athletic_revenue_per_fte.transformationDescription: total_athletic_revenue / NULLIF(COALESCE(base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment, bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount), 0). NULL when either operand is NULL or when the COALESCE'd FTE ≤ 0. Inherits the fte_source of its denominator. No imputation.

recruiting_per_fte.transformationDescription: recruiting_expenses / NULLIF(COALESCE(base.ipeds_finance.total_fte_enrollment, bronze.eada.eada_fte_headcount), 0). NULL when either operand is NULL or when the COALESCE'd FTE ≤ 0. Inherits the fte_source of its denominator. No imputation.

athletic_subsidy_ratio.transformationDescription: (total_athletic_expenses - total_athletic_revenue) / NULLIF(total_athletic_expenses, 0). Independent of FTE source. Positive = subsidized by rest of budget; near 0 = self-sustaining; negative = profitable. Range constrained to [-3.0, 1.0] per BSE-EAD-007 (silver-EDA-calibrated 2026-04-30; original [-1.0, 1.0] band was empirically falsified by 4 institutions — Binghamton -2.92, Haskell Indian Nations -2.56, Kennedy-King -1.57, Rust College -1.43 — reflecting institutional-transfer accounting). BSE-EAD-010 OPE-ledger invariant (silver-EDA-calibrated 2026-04-30): P50 == 0 AND P5 < 0 AND P95 == 0 (63% of rows have revenue == expenses exactly because the OPE/EADA ledger convention double-counts institutional support on both sides).

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Direct passthrough of the bronze ingest's load_date. Provenance — the date bronze.eada was landed.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: Stamped at base-promote time by the silver transformer. NOT inherited from bronze — this records when base.eada was produced, not when bronze.eada was landed.

assertions.name: athletic_subsidy_ratio in [-3.0, 1.0] where non-null (silver-EDA-calibrated 2026-04-30; widened from [-1.0, 1.0] after 4-institution empirical falsification)
Arithmetic invariant: athletic_spend_per_fte * total_fte_enrollment ≈ total_athletic_expenses within $1
athletic_subsidy_ratio P50 == 0 with P5 < 0 and P95 == 0 (OPE ledger convention)
Tautology: total_fte_enrollment IS NULL iff fte_source = 'none'
IPEDS-preference invariant: every IPEDS-Finance UNITID with non-null total_fte_enrollment stamps fte_source = 'ipeds_finance'
